summary: Nice audience recording captures a fun overall show
review: The audience‑sourced FLAC offers clear and pleasant sound that lets the energy of the night shine through. Reviewers describe the performance as enjoyable and “fun” even though no specific songs are highlighted, making it a solid listen for Deadheads looking for a good vibe.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑to‑positive review (4 stars) mentions nice sound and an enjoyable show, indicating a generally good performance with decent audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice sound; audience source captures ambience well with clear enough mix for listening enjoyment.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fun overall performance with solid pacing, though no particular moments are singled out.
